summary: Iteration 24: Landing Page Redesign - ALL TESTS PASSED. The new dark premium theme landing page with gold/amber and teal accents is fully functional. All 21 features tested and verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page redesign implements brand narrative excellently: 'If glasses are for your eyes, words are vision for your mind'
Dark premium theme (#0A0F1E background) with gold (#D4A853) and teal (#38BDF8) accents looks professional
All navigation links correctly route to their destinations (14 navigation tests passed)
Hero section has correct headline, images, and CTA buttons
Stats bar correctly displays: 20+ Languages, 5 User Roles, 60/30/10 Learning Tiers, 50+ Currencies
Philosophy section displays 'See the whole world with Semantic Vision'
How It Works section shows 3 steps with proper descriptions
Brand integration section shows patent-pending technology with checklist
Cultural awareness section shows feature badges (20+ languages, Belief-system aware, Cultural context, Virtue education)
60/30/10 Learning System shows three tier cards (Baseline, Target, Stretch)
For Everyone section shows 4 clickable role cards with correct navigation
CTA section displays 'Give your child the gift of vision' with Get Started and Sponsor buttons
Footer shows copyright '2026 Semantic Vision. Building vocabulary, one story at a time.'
Smooth scroll animations work correctly (framer-motion useInView)
Mobile responsiveness tested and working - all elements visible and functional on 390x844 viewport
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None required for landing page tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign complete. Dark premium theme with gold/amber and teal accents. All navigation buttons work correctly. Mobile responsive. All sections have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
